sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Employee benefits are additional advantages provided by the company beyond the employee's salary. Benefits may include health insurance, allowances, wellness programs, and other company-specific incentives.

sections.title: Eligibility
content: Benefits may vary depending on employment type.
Some benefits become available after the probation period.

sections.title: How to Request Benefits
content: Submit your request through the HR portal.
Wait for HR review and approval.

sections.title: Best Practices
content: Contact HR if you have questions.

content.question: Am I eligible for medical insurance?
content.answer: Eligibility depends on company policy and your employment status.

content.question: How can I update my insurance information?
content.answer: Submit the update through the HR portal or contact HR.

content.question: Can I request additional benefits?
content.answer: Some additional benefits may be available depending on company policy.
